text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Colorado State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? Yes. So I was asking if you've received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
